summary: Created idempotent CMS seed script for the dashboard empty state page. The script creates a cms_pages record with slug 'dashboard-empty-state' and title 'Dashboard Empty State' (is_published: true), then inserts one cms_blocks record of type 'empty_state' (is_visible: true) with content { heading: 'Add your first pet to create their profile', subheading: '' }. Guard clause at the top skips execution if the slug already exists. Added two npm scripts to package.json: db:seed:cms-empty-state (compiled JS) and db:seed:cms-empty-state:dev (tsx direct). TypeScript compilation verified clean.
notes_for_reviewer: The empty_state block_type is not present in the frontend BlockType union in frontend/src/api/cms.ts — that union only covers homepage block types. If the frontend needs to fetch and render this block, BlockType and a corresponding content interface will need to be extended.
Pattern exactly matches seed-cms.ts: same imports, same CmsPage interface, same pool.end() in finally, same JSON.stringify for content.
